calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Continued To Dec-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-12-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-06-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
David Feingold, Esq. for Plaintiff: Diamond Heights Village Owners Assoc., a California Non-Profit Mutual Benefic Corp., Plaintiff's witness: James Ernst is also present in court.
Donald Amambgo, Esq., for Defendant: Kristen L. Rank, also presentl
Matter settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to pay the sum of $9,00.00 in 24 monthly payment of $375.00 starting on Nov. 1, 2005 and deliquent after the 15th of each month. If default on any payment, Judgment shall be enter for Plaintiff in total of $13,000.00 less any credit made, plus 10% interst, fees and costs. Payment shall be mail to Mr. Ernst at 120 Stoney Road, Suite 150, Santa Rosa, CA. 95401.
Defendant to provide SS. number, home address, work address and telephone numbers, and parents' phone number.
Defendant do not own any real property, is on disability and no liquid asset.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.
The Court placed this matter on CRC-225 calendar on Nov. 6, 2007 in Dept. 212 at 10:00 A. M. for Dismissal.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Set For Trial On Sep-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
